title: 🚨 NWS Moderate: Winter Weather Advisory
summary:
* WHAT...Snow and blowing snow expected. Total snow accumulations up
to 6 inches. Winds gusting as high as 40 mph.

* WHERE...Kuskokwim Delta Coast and Nunivak Island and Western Capes.

* WHEN...Until 10 AM AKDT Tuesday.

* IMPACTS...Visibilities reduced to one half mile or less due to
blowing snow. Travel could be very difficult. Gusty winds could
blow around unsecured objects.

* ADDITIONAL ...
sourceAttribution: Source: National Weather Service CAP Feed
